import React from'react';import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AssetPriceHistory=_ref=>{let{asset}=_ref;// Extract price history from the asset
const priceHistory=asset.priceHistory||[];// Sort price history by timestamp in descending order (newest first)
const sortedHistory=[...priceHistory].sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.timestamp)-new Date(a.timestamp));// Format date and time
const formatDateTime=dateString=>{const options={year:'numeric',month:'short',day:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'};return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString(undefined,options);};// Format currency
const formatCurrency=value=>{return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US',{style:'currency',currency:'USD'}).format(value);};// Calculate price change percentage compared to previous price
const calculatePriceChange=currentIndex=>{if(currentIndex===sortedHistory.length-1)return null;// No previous price for first entry
const currentPrice=sortedHistory[currentIndex].price;const previousPrice=sortedHistory[currentIndex+1].price;const changePercent=(currentPrice-previousPrice)/previousPrice*100;return changePercent;};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"asset-price-history",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:["Price History - ",asset.name," (",asset.symbol,")"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Date & Time"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Price"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Change"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:sortedHistory.map((record,index)=>{const priceChange=calculatePriceChange(index);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:formatDateTime(record.timestamp)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:formatCurrency(record.price)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{className:priceChange>0?'change-positive':priceChange<0?'change-negative':'',children:priceChange!==null?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[priceChange>0?'↑':priceChange<0?'↓':''," ".concat(Math.abs(priceChange).toFixed(2),"%")]}):'—'})]},record._id||index);})})]})]});};export default AssetPriceHistory;
